Kong Yan (Shuyuan) 孔衍 (舒元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Yan (孔衍), styledShuyuan (舒元). Writer. Kong Yan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
